zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroi Botterel於1050年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓斯艾福時，他的父親Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne51歲，母親Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille23歲。他和Lesceline de Bretagne至少有1個兒子。他去世於1096年享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffroi Botterel于1050年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓斯艾福时，他的父亲Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne51岁，母亲Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille23岁。他和Lesceline de Bretagne至少有1个儿子。他去世于1096年享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Botterel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Buttery
meanings: from Anglo-Norman French boterie ‘buttery’ (from Late Latin botaria, a derivative of bota ‘cask’), hence a metonymic occupational name for the keeper of a buttery. The term originally denoted a store for liquor but soon came to mean a store for provisions in general.

variants.name: Butter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Arno, Gerhard, Mathias, Reinhart.
Dutch and German: occupational name for a dairyman or seller of butter, from Middle Dutch butter and Middle High German buter.
English: occupational name for a dairyman, a shortened form of Middle English buterer ‘maker or seller of butter’. Alternatively, it may be a nickname from Middle English buter(e) ‘butter’.

variants.name: Botterill
meanings: 1 Norman, English: locative name from Les Bottereaux (Eure, Normandy), a place-name which apparently meant ‘the toads’. The surname is found in both a singular form Boterel and a plural form Boterels, Botereaus, which has developed to Buttress. Some of the post-medieval bearers may belong under (2).

2 Norman, English: occupational name from Anglo-Norman French * boterel, a diminutive form of Old French * boter ‘an officer who looks after the (wine) butts’. Both terms are derivatives of Old French butte, bote ‘wine-butt, cask’.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroi Botterel was born in 1050, in Penthièvre, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, was 51 and his mother, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, was 23. He had at least 1 son with Lesceline de Bretagne. He died in 1096, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroi Botterel est né en 1050, à Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lesceline de Bretagne. Il est décédé en 1096, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroi Botterel 1050 in Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne 51 und seine Mutter Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille 23. Er hatte mit Lesceline de Bretagne mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1096 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroi Botterel è nato il nel 1050 nel Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lesceline de Bretagne. Morì nel 1096, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: フランスブレタグンモービハンペンスイevア
ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Botterelが1050年にフランスブレタグンモービハンペンスイevアで生まれた時，父Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagneは51歳，母Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouailleは23歳であった。彼はLesceline de Bretagneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1096年に46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Botterel(이)가 1050년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 펜스이e브르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Lesceline de Bretagne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1096년 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroi Botterel nasceu em 1050, em Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lesceline de Bretagne. Ele faleceu em 1096, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroi Botterel родился в 1050 г. в местности пентиeвр, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lesceline de Bretagne. Он умер в 1096 г. в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroi Botterel nació en 1050, en Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Orguen ou Agnes de Cornouaille, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Lesceline de Bretagne. Murió en 1096, a la edad de 46 años.
